education.description:
Outstanding Achievements

  • Consistently awarded the title of Excellent Student for the 2024-2025 and 2025-2026 academic years.

  • Co-authored a scientific research paper accepted for publication at the SCI-2026 international conference.

  • Completed 134 credits, establishing a comprehensive foundation in software engineering, systems architecture, and emerging technologies.

Key Academic Coursework (A/A+ Grades)

  • Algorithms & Mathematics: Advanced Data Structures & Algorithms (A+), Advanced Mathematics 1 & 2 (9.6), Discrete Mathematics (8.6).

  • AI & Data Processing: Advanced Machine Learning (10.0), Artificial Intelligence (9.8), Data Analysis & Visualization (9.9).

  • Systems & Security: System Programming (9.7), Information Security (9.6), Software Testing & Quality Assurance (9.9).

  • Software Development: Java Programming, Secure Web Software Development, .NET Programming (10.0).

education.school: Bachkhoa Education Aptech | International IT Training Program
education.description:
• Intensive Training: Completed an intensive 18-month program focused on enterprise-grade software engineering and application development.

  • Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC): Mastered the end-to-end professional development lifecycle—from rigorous requirements analysis and database schema design to the deployment of complex multi-tier architectures utilizing Servlet, JSP, EJB, and the Spring Framework.

  • Capstone Project: Graduated with Excellence for a practical capstone project, demonstrating the strict and effective application of core software Design Patterns to solve real-world business problems.

Knowledge Management & Language Skills

  • Systematic Self-Learning: Architected a "Second Brain" knowledge base across Notion and Obsidian, cataloging over 1,000+ technical notes and code snippets.

  • P.A.R.A Framework: Successfully applied the P.A.R.A method (Projects, Areas, Resources, Archives) to systematically organize information, significantly accelerating the learning curve for emerging backend technologies like Go, Rust, and Microservices.

  • Technical English: Highly proficient in reading, analyzing, and synthesizing complex technical documentation and international scientific research papers.

  • Professional Communication: Currently preparing for IELTS 6.5+, with a strong focus on technical report writing and cross-functional communication to thrive in international engineering environments.

skillContent:
• Frontend Frameworks: React, Vue.js, Next.js, Nuxt.js and other SSR frameworks

  • Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript(ES6+), HTML5, CSS3

experience.details:
• Java Expertise: Highly proficient in Java Core (8, 11, 17) with a deep understanding of Functional Programming (Streams, Lambda), Multi-threading, and Memory Management (JVM) for high-performance applications.

  • Spring Ecosystem: Mastered Spring Boot, Spring Security (OAuth2/JWT), Spring Data JPA, Hibernate, and Spring Cloud for building scalable and secure microservices.

  • System Design & Architecture: Deep understanding of SOLID and DRY principles, with practical application of Core Design Patterns (Singleton, Factory, Observer, Strategy) to write clean, efficient, and maintainable code.

• Relational Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle SQL. Experienced in designing normalized schemas (3NF), optimizing indexes to accelerate query performance, and writing efficient Stored Procedures for large-scale data.

  • NoSQL & Caching: MongoDB (Complex Aggregations) and Redis (Data types, Pub/Sub). Applied advanced caching strategies to significantly reduce database load and accelerate API response times.

  • Messaging Systems: Proficient in Apache Kafka for handling asynchronous data streaming and decoupling microservices in high-throughput environments.

• Containerization & Orchestration: Proficient in Docker and Docker Compose. Experienced in managing scalable clusters using Kubernetes (K8s), with hands-on expertise in configuring Pods, Services, Ingress, and ConfigMaps.

  • CI/CD Pipelines: Automated deployment workflows utilizing GitHub Actions, seamlessly integrating Unit Testing and continuous Security Scanning (DevSecOps) to ensure code quality and system integrity.

  • System Administration: Professional Linux environment administration (Ubuntu/CentOS). Configured Nginx as a Reverse Proxy and Load Balancer to guarantee high availability and optimal traffic distribution.

projects.name: FATS.vn – Smart Financial Management Ecosystem
projects.description:
• Tech Stack: Spring Boot, MySQL, MongoDB, Docker, AI Integration (OCR).

  • Technical Implementation & Details:

    • Complex Business Logic: Designed robust algorithms for cash flow calculation and group fund allocation. Automated transaction categorization by engineering a hybrid parsing solution utilizing Regular Expressions (Regex) and AI models.

    • Data Architecture: Leveraged MySQL to guarantee strict ACID compliance for core financial transactions, while utilizing MongoDB to efficiently store, index, and query large-scale Audit Logs and activity histories.

    • Financial Data Security: Applied AES-256 encryption to secure sensitive financial records and implemented granular, Method-level Security for strict API authorization control.

    • OCR Integration: Deployed Optical Character Recognition (OCR) services to automatically extract text from invoice images, significantly accelerating the data entry pipeline for end-users.

projects.name: AI7.vn – Anti-Unemployment Platform
projects.description:
• Tech Stack: Java Spring Boot, MongoDB, WebSockets, Nginx.

  • Technical Implementation & Details:

    • Real-time Communication: Built low-latency notification and instant messaging modules between enterprises and freelancers utilizing the WebSocket protocol.

    • Workflow Management: Engineered a complex Workflow Engine to manage dynamic job states and track project progress in real-time.

    • Search & Query Optimization: Executed deep indexing strategies (e.g., Compound Indexes) on MongoDB to optimize candidate search queries based on multi-criteria combinations (skills/location). Successfully reduced search latency from over 1 second to under 100ms.

    • Scalable Deployment: Containerized the application into Docker images and managed environment configurations via Docker Compose, facilitating seamless horizontal scaling.

projects.name: Nhanvietadv – Billboard E-commerce Platform
projects.description:
Technical Implementation & Details:

  • Backend Development: Engineered a robust module for managing complex, multi-variant product data structures and integrated a secure payment processing pipeline.

  • Frontend Architecture: Developed a responsive Admin Dashboard utilizing React.js, leveraging Redux for centralized state management to ensure seamless data synchronization across order and user profiles.

  • System Security: Implemented JWT-based authentication for secure session management and deployed defensive mechanisms to successfully mitigate Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) and Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerabilities.

custom-2.description:
Software Engineer & Infrastructure Researcher | SCI-2026 Author | LFCS & Rust Certified

Dedicated Information Technology student at Electric Power University with a powerhouse academic foundation, including DSA (A+), Machine Learning (10.0), and Artificial Intelligence (9.8). I bridge the gap between theoretical research and enterprise-grade execution, evidenced by my published research on DevSecOps at the SCI-2026 International Conference.

With professional experience as a Backend Developer at Techbyte and BZCOM, I have a proven track record of optimizing system performance and deploying cloud-native architectures using Java, Spring Boot, and Kubernetes. As a Certified Linux Administrator and Rust enthusiast, I am deeply passionate about the mechanics of Information Retrieval. My goal is to leverage my expertise in systems programming and high-performance computing to engineer core search engine components—specifically crawlers and indexers—while continuously refining search algorithms for maximum efficiency.

custom-3.title: Công ty TNHH Công nghệ Techbyte
custom-3.subtitle: Backend Developer
custom-3.description:
• API Development: Designed and implemented scalable RESTful APIs using Java Spring Boot for web and mobile platforms (FATS.vn, AI7.vn), focusing on writing clean, efficient, and maintainable code.

  • Security & Authorization: Implemented robust JWT-based session management and Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to guarantee system security and data integrity.

  • Data Optimization: Architected database schemas and optimized complex queries across MySQL and MongoDB, significantly reducing system latency and accelerating data retrieval.

  • Collaboration & Code Quality: Managed version control via Git/GitHub. Actively participated in technical discussions, Pull Requests, and rigorous Code Reviews to ensure high engineering standards and foster a strong teamwork mindset.

custom-5.description:
• Getting Started with Rust (LFEL1002) – The Linux Foundation: Certified on March 22, 2026 (Certificate ID: LF-s8e9psk3ax). Validates foundational knowledge in Rust syntax, memory safety, and the Cargo ecosystem.

  • LFCS (Linux Foundation Certified System Administrator): Professional-grade certification for managing Linux systems, storage, and networking.

  • Introduction to WebAssembly (LFD133) – The Linux Foundation: Completed March 23, 2026 (ID: LF-xktyc0wdd4). Validates mastery in Wasm fundamentals, binary format, and high-performance web integration.

  • SCI-2026 International Research Recognition: Awarded for research in Cloud-native Security and DevSecOps Optimization.

  • Full Stack Java Plus – Bachkhoa-Aptech: 18-month intensive program, graduated with Excellence.

custom-6.description:
Published Research & International Conference Paper

Applying DevSecOps for Secure Software Deployment in Cloud Computing Environments Presented at the 8th International Conference on Smart Computing and Informatics (SCI-2026) (Link)

  • Role: Core Researcher – Infrastructure & Security Architect

  • Tech Stack: Java 17, Spring Boot 3.x, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, Kubernetes (K8s), Terraform, GitHub Actions.

  • Academic & Technical Contributions:

    • Research Publication: Co-authored and presented research on DevSecOps at SCI-2026, demonstrating the integration of security into cloud-native lifecycles.

    • Security Architecture: Applied Shift-left Security principles by integrating SAST (SonarQube) and vulnerability scanning (Snyk/Trivy) into CI/CD pipelines.

    • Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Orchestrated K8s clusters and service configurations using Terraform and Helm Charts, ensuring 100% environment consistency.

    • Observability: Built a comprehensive monitoring system using Prometheus & Grafana, implementing automated alerting for resource optimization.

    • Scalability: Configured Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) to maintain system stability during traffic spikes.

  • Key Impact:

    • Maintained 99.8% system uptime under a heavy load of 5,000 concurrent users.

    • Proactively identified and mitigated 19 critical vulnerabilities prior to deployment.

    • Research recognized by the SCI-2026 committee (organized by Swinburne University & FPT Education).

AI-Powered EdTech Platform for Online Grading Innovative EdTech Research & Development Project

  • Role: Backend Developer & System Architect

  • Tech Stack: Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, Apache Kafka, OpenAI API, Redis, Nginx.

  • Technical Implementation & Details:

    • Asynchronous Processing: Implemented Apache Kafka to manage exam submission queues asynchronously, successfully preventing system bottlenecks during massive concurrent submission spikes from thousands of students.

    • Caching Strategy: Applied a Write-through Cache strategy utilizing Redis to temporarily store active exam sessions, effectively reducing direct primary database queries by 60%.

    • AI & LLM Integration: Engineered a module integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) via OpenAI API to automate question bank generation based on exam matrices and assist in preliminary essay grading.

    • High Availability Architecture: Configured an Nginx Load Balancer using the Round Robin algorithm to seamlessly distribute high-volume traffic across multiple backend nodes.

  • Key Achievements: Architected a system meeting Zero-downtime standards; achieved 100% automation in quiz generation and multiple-choice grading, drastically reducing result publication latency from several days to mere seconds.
